page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs using the x86_64 architecture, driven by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external network storage for boot and data volumes.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier across multiple workloads. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a stress-ng single-core score of 1563.99 and a multi-core score of 8283.11. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 462.63 GB/sec, which drops to 59.02 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Cryptographic and compression capabilities are supported by hardware flags such as AVX-512 and AES, enabling a single-threaded gzip compression speed of 26.95 GB/sec and a multi-threaded bzip3 decompression speed of 40.3 GB/sec.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated core allocation ensures consistent CPU performance without virtualization-induced noisy neighbor effects, though the 6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and lack of local storage represent clear architectural tradeoffs. This profile is appropriate for general-purpose workloads, database operations, static web serving, and moderate redis caching tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz. It is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and integrated GPUs. Operating under the KVM hypervisor, the instance delivers average-tier benchmark results, including a stress-ng multi-core score of 8283.11 and a PassMark CPU score of 9694.64. Memory bandwidth reaches 462.63 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 59.02 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Network connectivity is limited to a 6 Gbps baseline. This hardware profile is designed for general-purpose applications, static web serving, and database operations that do not require high-speed local NVMe storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a 6 Gbps baseline network, designed for balanced workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7ne.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated eight-core x86_64 compute resource with balanced memory allocation and standard network bandwidth for general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor at 3.3 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or integrated GPUs
Supports AVX-512 and AES vector extensions for accelerated compression and cryptography
Suited for general-purpose applications, static web serving, and database operations
